stemHtml: A pallet of 1 500 kg needs to be removed from the cargo hold situated at the position of 1 650 cm. The new total mass after removal of the pallet will be 19 340 kg and the new CG at 1 270 cm. The forward CG limit is at 860 cm and the aft CG limit is at 1 360 cm. By mistake another package of 1 500 kg is removed from a position of 680 cm and the original pallet at 1 650 cm is left on board. What is the new CG?

options.a: 40 cm aft of the aft CG limit.
options.b: 40 cm forward of the aft CG limit.
options.c: 15 cm aft of the aft CG limit.
options.d: 15 cm forward of the aft CG limit.
